Package de.jvstvshd.necrify.common.punishment

Class AbstractPunishment

java.lang.Object
de.jvstvshd.necrify.common.punishment.AbstractPunishment
All Implemented Interfaces:
Punishment, ReasonHolder
Direct Known Subclasses:
AbstractTemporalPunishment, NecrifyKick
public abstract class AbstractPunishment extends Object implements Punishment

  • Method Details

    • getReason

      @NotNull public @NotNull net.kyori.adventure.text.Component getReason()
      Description copied from interface: ReasonHolder
      Gets the reason of this punishment. All placeholders will be replaced with their actual values.
      Specified by:
      getReason in interface ReasonHolder
      Returns:
      the reason of this punishment as as component

    • getRawReason

      @NotNull public @NotNull net.kyori.adventure.text.Component getRawReason()
      Description copied from interface: ReasonHolder
      Gets the reason of this punishment. All placeholders will remain as they are.
      Specified by:
      getRawReason in interface ReasonHolder
      Returns:
      the reason of this punishment as as component

      protected <T> CompletableFuture<T> executeAsync(Callable<T> task, ExecutorService executorService)

    • getUser

      @NotNull public @NotNull NecrifyUser getUser()
      Specified by:
      getUser in interface Punishment
      Returns:
      the user this punishment is affecting

    • getPunishmentUuid

      @NotNull public @NotNull UUID getPunishmentUuid()
      Description copied from interface: Punishment
      Returns the id of this punishment. This is a unique identifier for this punishment and is used to identify only this punishment instance. This is not the same as the player's uuid.
      Specified by:
      getPunishmentUuid in interface Punishment
      Returns:
      the id of this punishment.

    • convertReason

      protected String convertReason(net.kyori.adventure.text.Component component)

    • punish

      public final CompletableFuture<Punishment> punish()
      Description copied from interface: Punishment
      Punishes the player finally.
      Specified by:
      punish in interface Punishment
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture containing the exerted punishment

    • cancel

      public final CompletableFuture<Punishment> cancel()
      Description copied from interface: Punishment
      Cancels this punishment thus allowing the player e.g. to join the server
      Specified by:
      cancel in interface Punishment
      Returns:
      a CompletableFuture containing the cancelled punishment

    • getUuid

      @NotNull public @NotNull UUID getUuid()
      Description copied from interface: Punishment
      This will return the same as Punishment.getPunishmentUuid().

      Change in 1.2.0: Use NecrifyUser.getUuid() to retrieve the UUID this punishment belongs to!

      Specified by:
      getUuid in interface Punishment
      Returns:
      the uuid of the punished player.

    • getEventDispatcher

      @NotNull public @NotNull EventDispatcher getEventDispatcher()

    • getPlugin

      @NotNull public @NotNull AbstractNecrifyPlugin getPlugin()

    • hasSuccessor

      public boolean hasSuccessor()
      Description copied from interface: Punishment
      Returns whether this punishment has a successor punishment.
      Specified by:
      hasSuccessor in interface Punishment
      Returns:
      true, if this punishment has a successor punishment, otherwise false
      See Also:
      • Punishment.getSuccessor()

    • getSuccessor

      @NotNull public @NotNull Punishment getSuccessor()
      Description copied from interface: Punishment
      Returns the successor of this punishment. This is used to chain punishments so that one punishment of the same kind is paused until the previous one is finished. This may especially be useful for punishments of differing reasons.
      Specified by:
      getSuccessor in interface Punishment
      Returns:
      the successor of this punishment
      See Also:
      • Punishment.hasSuccessor()

    • getCreationTime

      @NotNull public @NotNull LocalDateTime getCreationTime()
      Description copied from interface: Punishment
      Returns the creation time of this punishment.
      Specified by:
      getCreationTime in interface Punishment
      Returns:
      the creation time of this punishment
      See Also:
      • Punishment.hasBeenCreated()

    • getPredecessor

      @Nullable public @Nullable Punishment getPredecessor()
      Description copied from interface: Punishment
      Returns the punishment that will precede this punishment. This means that the returned punishment has to run out before this punishment is active. This punishment begins when the predecessor ends.
      Specified by:
      getPredecessor in interface Punishment
      Returns:
      the predecessor of this punishment or null if there is no predecessor

    • hasBeenCreated

      public boolean hasBeenCreated()
      Description copied from interface: Punishment
      Returns whether this punishment has been created or not.
      Specified by:
      hasBeenCreated in interface Punishment
      Returns:
      true, if this punishment has been created, otherwise false
